name: swarm-code
description: Agent swarm adapter for Claude Code and Codex CLI — the host agent leads while OpenCode executes delegated worker tasks
author: Alejandro Apodaca Cordova (apoapps.com)

scripts.check: find plugins/swarm-code -name '*.mjs' -print -exec node --check {} \; && find plugins/swarm-code -name '*.sh' -print -exec bash -n {} \;
